composer_internal_placeholder: Internal note — not visible to customers.
no_messages: No messages yet. Be the first to reply.
attachment_too_large: Attachment file size cannot exceed 10 MB.
workflow_no_transitions: No status transitions available for your role.
workflow_status_note_placeholder: Add a short note for the audit trail
workflow_rejection_reason_placeholder: Explain why you reject this ticket
workflow_admin_override_approved: Normally the customer should approve this ticket. Click the button again to approve it as admin override.
workflow_admin_override_rejected: Normally the customer should reject this ticket and explain why. Click the button again to reject it as admin override.
workflow_customer_reject_warning: If you reject this ticket, please write the reason in the status note field first.
workflow_customer_rejection_required: Please write the rejection reason in the status note field first.
card_critical_body: This ticket is flagged urgent. Prioritise dispatch and update the customer once an operator is on site.
delete_ticket_dialog_body: Only delete this ticket if it was opened accidentally. This action will hide the ticket from normal views and reports. Messages, attachments, and history are preserved for audit. To continue, type the ticket number below.
request_assignment_hint: Ask an OSIUS manager to assign you to this ticket.
request_assignment_success: Request sent. A manager will review it shortly.
request_assignment_already_pending: You already have a pending request for this ticket.
request_assignment_pending_body: A manager will review your request shortly. You can cancel it before they act on it.
request_assignment_cancelled_success: Request cancelled. You can submit a new request if you change your mind.
request_assignment_cancel_dialog_body: The request will move to Cancelled. You can submit a new request for this ticket later.
assigned_staff_admin_desc: Add a staff member to this ticket directly. They do not need to submit an assignment request first.
assigned_staff_admin_no_eligible: No eligible staff for this building.
assigned_staff_admin_remove_dialog_body: {{name}} will no longer appear as assigned to this ticket. You can add them again later.
